seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Agents can create hypotheses in markdown, set persistent goals via set_goal tool, and support pause/resume for long-running tasks without losing progress; more context in goals reduces failure modes.
PSA on pausing/resuming goals in Codex agents, allowing seamless continuation and better workflow orchestration.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Agents save workflows to disk as reusable skills for persistent memory and compounding across sessions; connects to local models to build 30-50 skills, enabling one laptop to handle repeated research/report tasks efficiently.
Scales OpenClaw-style agents to 13,000 per 48G memory server via open-source breakthrough; enables massive parallel agent deployment with efficiency gains.

global_discoveries.project: mem0ai State of AI Agent Memory 2026
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Token-efficient memory algorithms achieve 92.5 LoCoMo / 94.4 LongMemEval at ~7k tokens vs 26k for full-context; biggest gains in temporal reasoning (+29.6) and multi-hop recall (+23.1); highlights open problems like cross-session identity.
Structured storage and intent capture for proactive agents delivers 10x token reduction; open-source memory system for production-grade persistent recall.
One-socket protocol for any env/trainer enables shared memory training across Meta, Nvidia, etc.; closes the loop for open-source agents to train models and harnesses together.

Framework for LLM agents to bootstrap skills and verification signals from open-world resources without target-task supervision; transferable skills across models with high automated benchmark performance.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: AI trading agent that audits its own strategies for self-correction.
near_misses.reason: Domain-specific trading focus rather than general AI technical innovation or open framework.

notes: Seed experts had limited high-signal technical posts in the window; prioritized @reach_vb's agent goal persistence details. Global search yielded strong memory/persistence and scaling themes. Max 6 per section enforced; only truly actionable technical items included.
